theme_strategy.rationale: Cinematic and spectral visuals map perfectly to a dark 'command center' aesthetic. The dark theme allows 'spectral' colors (NDVI indices, heatmaps, alerts) to glow and pop, aligning with 'The Performance Pro' meets 'Organic & Earthy' archetype.

typography.rationale: Outfit provides a structural, modern, and tech-forward voice for the marketing and dashboard headers without feeling like a generic template. Manrope offers high legibility for dense data displays in the dashboard.
rules: No Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Headings (>32px) must use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight.
Overlines/Labels must be Uppercase, tiny, and wide spacing: tracking-[0.2em].
Maximum H1 size is text-5xl to text-6xl. Do not exceed.
Line height: tight for headers (leading-none), loose for body (leading-relaxed).
No pure black (#000000) or pure gray. Use the provided green-tinted dark variables.
Use text-shadow on text placed over images or maps.
Always explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).

marketing.spacing: Generous (p-8 to p-24, gap-8 to gap-12)
marketing.structure: Asymmetrical overlapping elements, scroll-driven storytelling sections.
marketing.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 border-b border-white/10). No completely transparent headers.

dashboard.structure: Map-first layout. The primary view should be a massive satellite map with side panels for data feeds and alerts.
dashboard.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Flat solid backgrounds, 1px subtle borders, no soft shadows. Sharp edges.

rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding.
Never center-align paragraphs or dense data.

surface_strategies.marketing_header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-[#0a110d]/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.dashboard_panels: Grid Borders: flat solid background, border-r border-b border-border/40, zero radius or max 8px.
surface_strategies.alerts: Neumorphism with sharp 1px borders to ground them, high contrast text.

motion_and_interactions.marketing: Lenis for smooth scrolling. GSAP or Framer Motion for scroll-triggered reveals, parallax floating elements.
motion_and_interactions.dashboard: Minimalist micro-interactions. Quick fade-ins for heatmaps and tooltips.
rules: Do NOT use transition: all. Target specific properties.
Stagger entrance animations for list items (alert feeds).

3d_and_visuals.marketing_hero: react-globe.gl for a cinematic, 3D rotating earth showing satellite networks and connection nodes. Make background transparent to blend with UI.
3d_and_visuals.dashboard_map: react-map-gl for real-time 2D/3D field mapping. Use dark mode map tiles with glowing colored polygons (heatmaps) over the fields.
3d_and_visuals.charts: recharts wrapped in shadcn/ui components. Use spectral colors for data lines.

accessibility_and_localization.i18n: Implement a clear English/Hindi toggle in the header. Use standard i18n libraries (like react-i18next).
accessibility_and_localization.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use the custom tinted variables.
accessibility_and_localization.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

hero_backgrounds.description: Satellite aerial view of agricultural fields (Use with heavy dark/gradient overlay for contrast, bg-black/50)
Vibrant drone view of fields, can be used as a static fallback or UI section background

human_element.description: Farmer using tablet outdoors, brings the human tech element to the marketing page

component_guidelines.shadcn_ui: Use standard shadcn components but heavily customize. Remove the default Vercel border-radius/shadows. Match the 'Grid Borders' sharp tech look.
component_guidelines.toasts: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (alerts, upload status).
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select for the image upload and settings views.
component_guidelines.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone tech icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this entire JSON document carefully before starting implementation.
Implement the UI as a hybrid app: a marketing landing page AND a functional dashboard.
Setup React Router with two main flows: '/' (Marketing) and '/dashboard' (Operational).
Update tailwind.config.js with the provided HSL variables and font families.
Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lenis, react-globe.gl, react-map-gl, @phosphor-icons/react, recharts, react-i18next.
Do NOT use HTML input elements directly; strictly use Shadcn UI components for interactives.
Build the dashboard using a dense, cardless grid approach.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
